name: Malicious Base64 Encoded PowerShell Keywords in Command Lines Detected
description: When base64 encoded strings are used in hidden malicious Command and Scripting Interpreter, PowerShell command lines. Adversaries hide their activities by encoding commands to bypass detection with this technique.

prompts.prompt: Malicious Base64 encoded PowerShell keywords detected in command lines. Event Details: **Event ID** {event_id}, **Image** {image}, **Command** {command}, **User** {user}. Investigate this activity to determine if a malicious PowerShell script is executing encoded commands to evade detection.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Process Creation (should be 1).

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line containing malicious Base64 encoded keywords.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process ran.
